title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at RINL

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at RINL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, RINL in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
